name: Hikage Miyauchi
description: The middle of the three sisters in the Miyauchi family, Hikage goes to a high school in Tokyo, which she frequently tries to boast about to Renge.

name: Hiroshi Nakagawa
description: The chubby older brother of Ouran, harmless to all, who has a handsome face. He bemoans the "sad" world and is a neet who spends his days "monitoring" the internet.

name: Ikki
description: Fourth year University student. He is best friends with Kent and has a 19-year-old younger sister. He also likes playing darts, billiards, and table tennis. He is apparently unbeatable at any game that uses hands, which is basically every single game. One of his hobbies is solving Kent's math puzzles. His favorite animal is supposed to be the hamster. His symbolic route in the game is the "Spade." (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Jasmine Flamesworth
nativeName: ジャスミン・フレームスワース
description: Jasmine is a member of the adventurer party "Twin Horns" and a former comrade of Arthur’s parents. Although she is quiet and struggles to socialize, she is a skilled Augmenter who wields dual blades and is known for her sharp observational skills and high learning ability. (Source: Official Site)

name: K.K.
description: K.K. is a lively and confident Libra member who sports an eye. Typically cheerful, she cares deeply for her comrades & sons, whom she treasures above all else. She seems to have a slight complex about her age and figure, and openly dislikes being around Steven, whom she refers to as 'Scarface'. She shares a much closer relationship to Klaus, whom she describes as a perfect gentleman and the leader of her organization.

description: Karin is sometimes self-conscious, but she has a cheerful personality and is well-liked by everyone around her. She is also active as a model and is gaining popularity in Japan. She is a transfer student from Germany.

name: Kedama
description: [Mafuyu Satou](https://anilist.co/character/136844/)'s nine-month-old Pomeranian dog.

name: Makino
description: __Height:__ 166 cm __Affiliation:__ Partys Bar Makino is the Bartender from the hometown of Monkey D. Luffy, Foosha Village. Makino is a very kind woman and she was a close friend of Shanks, his crew, and Luffy. Makino appears to be a very prominent figure in Foosha Village. Her fondness for Luffy makes her appear as an adoptive mother or adoptive sister, showing interest in and supporting whatever Luffy's dream is. name: Maya Satou
description: She is a student of class 2-D. ~!In Volume 7.5, Maya asks for Kei Karuizawa's help to plan her "date" with Kiyotaka Ayanokouji. Kei was surprised and suggested other boys to her, but she refused, and said that she only liked Kiyotaka. She told her plan to Kei and made some changes according to her suggestions. name: Mizuki Suzushiro
description: The main character of the series. Mizuki is a really girly-looking guy who is greatly annoyed by how everyone keeps mistaking him for a girl all the time. One day, the trickster goddess decides to mess with him because she's bored and Mizuki wakes up with breasts and a missing part of his anatomy.

name: Motoharu
description: A member of Sanada North High student council, he has an intimidating look that is often mistaken as a delinquent. Although, he is actually gentle, shy, and he maintains a good relationship with his older sister. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Ramune
description: He is a doctor who specializes in treating patients with "mystery diseases," which are caused when something "strange" sneaks into the hearts of the weak-minded. He is a foul-mouthed physician who is rude to most and very rarely understands the atmosphere around him. However, he is a very skilled doctor who can quickly identify the root cause of any illness. But because he always puts his patient first, he tries not to treat them too harshly.

name: Ruby
description: Ruby has a great passion for Pokémon Contests. While he's an excellent battler, he only fights when necessary or when no one takes notice. He believes that Pokémon battles are barbaric, and get his Pokémon dirty — something that he does not like. Ruby is skilled at sewing and knitting. He makes clothes for all his Pokémon to wear, and even made Sapphire the clothes she wears for much of her adventures. description: __Height:__ 169 cm (5'5") One of the members of the Shikou Gakuen Student Council. He's a "fallen angel" instead of a devil like the other members. Shiki is a sadistic character who enjoys feeling pain and watching other people's pain. Shiki comes off as a strange, aloof person to most students, and many claim that he's rarely seen at school, even during the student council's announcements. description: Ame claims that she was Yuu's "knight" in her past life, and because of that, she dedicates herself to him and his wishes.
